title: Onboarding - Eula page - Privacy Policy link
scenario: Verify that tapping the Privacy Policy link on the EULA page navigates to the HP Privacy Policy page with a close button in the upper right corner instead of a back button.
expected: The user is directed to the HP Privacy Policy page (https://www.hp.com/us-en/privacy/privacy.html?jumpid=in_R11928_/us/en/corp/privacy-central/privacy-statements). The page displays a close button in the upper right corner, not a back button in the upper left corner.
